title: Create UIControl notification event type
description:
Create new UIControl notification event type to extend the existing notification system for UI state control.

This is the foundation task that enables all other UI control commands.

Implementation:
1. Extend NotificationEvent enum in notification_events.rs:
   - Add UIControl variant with nested enum for action types
   - Action types: ClearFocus, SetViewMode, SetSearch, MaximizeDetail, CloseDetail, ToggleSettings, SetSetting, CollapseColumn, etc.

2. Frontend handler in App.tsx:
   - Add new case in notification subscription
   - Dispatch to appropriate state setter based on action type
   - Reuse existing state management functions

3. CLI commands:
   - Add 'kbs console' subcommands for each action
   - Publish UIControl events via existing socket mechanism

4. Testing:
   - Verify each UI control command works end-to-end
   - Test that UI state matches both CLI and GUI actions
   - Verify localStorage persistence where applicable

Dependencies: None (extends existing notification system from tskl-e7j)
creator: ryan.porter
